hard_blockers.detail: BatchSilver contention-safe publication proof is still open.
The approved IAPD/PFID source contract has not been implemented or proven against the release watermark.
The approved Exhibit 21/8 subsidiary inventory, parser, identity, and derivation contract has not been implemented or proven.
The approved direct-filing/PCAOB auditor evidence contract has not been implemented or proven.
No frozen production candidate manifest or reconciled completion ledger exists.
The implementation commit has no bound warehouse or MDM production image digests.
Warehouse, MDM, Graph, Release Data Operator, and Release Owner attestations are unassigned.

launch_decision.reason: Starting the current deployed workflow cannot produce a Full-Chain Launch Pass.
